title: Artemis II astronauts share image of Earth as they pass halfway to the moon
summary_full: Moon-bound astronauts said a view of the entire Earth, complete with northern lights, was ‘the most spectacular moment’The four Artemis astronauts have passed the halfway point between Earth and the moon on the way to their planned lunar flyby, Nasa said on Friday evening.“We’re halfway there,” Nasa posted on social media. Continue reading...
